scrapedName: Hoi An Surrounding And Beach Break 7 days

itinerary.title: Hoi An Arrival - Embrace the Peaceful Charm of the Ancient Town
itinerary.description:
Afternoon

Upon arrival at Da Nang International, our driver and guide will pick you up and transfer you to the hotel in Hoi An. Tonight is your free time to immerse yourself in the sparkling scenery of Hoi An night. Here are some optional recommendations for your refer:

Hue Night Food Tour Half day

	

From US $48 /pax




Hue Street Food Tour on Foot

	

From US $28 /pax

itinerary.title: Life As A Farmer In Tra Que Village - Taste Hoi An’s Flavors on a Food Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, join a cycle trip to Tra Que organic farm through rice fields and meander village roads. Arrive at the farm and have a short break with a cup of tea in the host family’s house and start ready for farming work. Participating in local farming activities, you will garden together and experience rural life. After a hard and fun day, taste local food for lunch and return to Hoi An ancient town. Afternoon & Night 

We'll meet you at the designated meeting point to embark on our exciting walking street food tour

itinerary.title: Discover the Sacred Beauty of My Son Sanctuary
itinerary.description:
Morning 

We'll pick you up from your hotel around 08:00 and 08:30 for a tour to My Son Sanctuary. Cross the picturesque Cua Dai Bridge, offering stunning views of the Hoi An river, mountains, and Cham Islands. Upon arrival at My Son Sanctuary, often referred to as the "Valley of Kings," you'll discover its rich history as the capital of the Cham Pa Kingdom for 11 centuries starting from the 4th century. Experience a traditional dance performance and take a leisurely walk to the Cham area, following a scenic jungle-bordered track. Learn about the ancient Cham royal burial ground and the religi...

itinerary.title: Escape to Ba Na Hills Full Day
itinerary.description:
Morning

In the morning, between 07:45 and 08:00, our bus will pick you up from your hotel after your breathfast, ready to embark on an unforgettable journey to the mesmerizing Ba Na Hills. Our adventure begins with a scenic ride on the Suoi Mo Cable Car, offering breathtaking views of the surrounding mountains as we ascend to Marseille Station. Upon reaching Marseille Station, you'll have the chance to marvel at the Golden Bridge.This iconic bridge, held aloft by two giant stone hands, seemingly floats above the clouds, creating a surreal and magical atmosphere. Our next stop is the enchantin...

itinerary.title: Da Nang Departure
itinerary.description:
Morning

Delight in the last breakfast in Hoi An and process check out in the hotel. Freely enjoy the last moments of your leisure time, and our driver will pick you up right after at Da Nang airport for your departure flight. Hope you have a good flight and see your next excursion!

highlights: Wander through the well-preserved ancient town of Hoi An, adorned with charming lantern-lit streets and historic architecture.
Ascend to the picturesque Ba Na Hills, a mountain retreat with French colonial remnants and modern attractions.
Take leisurely walks along the coastline, indulge in water activities, or simply relax in the tranquil beauty of the surroundings at An Bang Beach.
Participate in traditional farming activities alongside local farmers in Tra Que village.
included: All transport within Vietnam (including airport pick up & see off), as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
